label: Unreal Engine
description: AAA game engine with C++ and Blueprints.

phases.label: Unreal Basics
phases.description: Editor, project setup, and C++/Blueprint workflow.

topics.label: Editor & Project Setup
topics.description: Create a project, navigate the editor, and understand the level/world structure.

topics.label: Actors & Components
topics.description: AActor, UActorComponent, and the component-based architecture.

topics.label: Gameplay Framework
topics.description: GameMode, PlayerController, Pawn, Character, HUD, GameState.

topics.label: UE C++ Macros
topics.description: UPROPERTY, UFUNCTION, UCLASS, USTRUCT. Reflection and GC integration.

topics.label: Blueprints & C++ Integration
topics.description: Call C++ from Blueprints and vice versa. BlueprintCallable, BlueprintImplementableEvent.

topics.label: Input System
topics.description: Enhanced Input System — Input Actions, Input Mapping Contexts.

topics.label: Physics & Collision
topics.description: Collision profiles, physics bodies, and overlap/hit events.

topics.label: AI (Behavior Trees)
topics.description: AI Controllers, Behavior Trees, Blackboards, and EQS.

topics.label: UI (UMG)
topics.description: UMG widgets, HUD, menus, and data binding with C++.

topics.label: Materials & Rendering
topics.description: Material editor, shaders, post-processing, and Nanite/Lumen.

topics.label: Networking (Replication)
topics.description: Actor replication, RPCs, and multiplayer gameplay.

topics.label: Packaging & Deployment
topics.description: Build, cook, and package for Windows, consoles, and mobile.
